name: wdpkr-deep-eval
description: Deep retrieval eval for wdpkr against its own docstring-mode index. Cases are tagged by query style (nl, keyword, symbol, where, concept) so metrics can be sliced by phrasing. Gold sets are kept tight (1-2 primary files) so MRR and recall are meaningful.

cases.label: git-diff-nl
cases.query: How does wdpkr compute the git diff of changed files between two commits?

cases.label: git-diff-keyword
cases.query: git diff changed deleted files between shas

cases.label: walk-gitignore-nl
cases.query: How are repository files walked while respecting gitignore rules?

cases.label: walk-gitignore-keyword
cases.query: walk files respect gitignore hidden

cases.label: change-detection-nl
cases.query: How does change detection skip files whose content has not changed since last index?

cases.label: document-id-symbol
cases.query: document_id deterministic blake3 hash for idempotent upserts

cases.label: idempotent-upsert-concept
cases.query: idempotent upserts stable ids on re-index

cases.label: rollup-nl
cases.query: How are very large files summarized when they exceed the token threshold?

cases.label: rollup-keyword
cases.query: big file rollup token threshold

cases.label: prompt-templates-nl
cases.query: What prompt templates are sent to the summarizer model?

cases.label: anthropic-adapter-nl
cases.query: How does the Anthropic summarizer call the Messages API with retries?

cases.label: input-type-nl
cases.query: How are search queries embedded differently from indexed documents?

cases.label: input-type-keyword
cases.query: voyage input_type query versus document

cases.label: duckdb-cosine-nl
cases.query: How does the local store rank vectors by cosine distance with brute force search?

cases.label: turbopuffer-v2-nl
cases.query: How does the Turbopuffer adapter use the v2 upsert and query API?

cases.label: callgraph-nl
cases.query: How are caller and callee edges resolved between symbols across files?

cases.label: cost-estimate-nl
cases.query: How is the cost of an index run estimated without calling any APIs?

cases.label: search-output-nl
cases.query: How are search results rendered as JSON and human-readable pretty output?

cases.label: tiered-results-concept
cases.query: results grouped into files with nested symbols tiered ranking

cases.label: cli-dispatch-nl
cases.query: How are CLI subcommands parsed and dispatched to handlers?

cases.label: jsdoc-cleaning-nl
cases.query: How are JSDoc comments cleaned and folded into readable text?

cases.label: python-docstring-nl
cases.query: How are Python docstrings extracted from the first statement of a function body?

cases.label: language-config-concept
cases.query: per language node types symbols comments imports

cases.label: mock-embedder-nl
cases.query: How does the mock embedder produce deterministic vectors for tests?

cases.label: mock-store-nl
cases.query: How does the mock vector store implement in-memory search?

cases.label: namespace-derivation-nl
cases.query: How is the index namespace derived from the git remote URL?

cases.label: embed-batching-keyword
cases.query: batch embeddings against provider max batch size

cases.label: ollama-probe-nl
cases.query: How does the Ollama embedder probe its embedding dimension on startup?

cases.label: config-set-nl
cases.query: How does setting a dotted config key write it back to the config file?

cases.label: store-trait-where
cases.query: Where is the VectorStore trait defined?

cases.label: retry-backoff-keyword
cases.query: exponential backoff retry on 429 and 5xx

cases.label: docstring-builders-where
cases.query: Where are the docstring and signature embed text builders?
